visualAssessment: 375px mobile: HUD matte reduced to 12px, border at inset-3, DEV.OS label + clock only on top edge (LAT/LON + SID hidden, UPTIME hidden). SectionHUD swapped to a compact top horizontal strip with [01/06] SYS.BOOT + 2px progress bar; vertical rail hidden. SectionNav dots hidden. Hero: giant 01 reduced to clamp(3.5rem,11vw,10rem) ~56px, SYSTEM / // BOOT headline at clamp(2.25rem,8vw,7.5rem) ~36px, nowrap preserved, subtitle text-sm, CTA visible, boot-log terminal only on md+. About: stats row collapses to 1 col below sm, meta line hides LAT/LON on mobile, bio text-sm. Skills: dedicated vertical stack renders 5 module panels without pinning; SkillBars display name + percent cleanly. Projects: card sizing switched to fluid max-w[min(560px,100%)] on <lg, fixed 520x620 kept on lg+; EXECUTION.LAYER uses clamp(2.5rem,10vw,8rem). Contact: PING // THE_CORE clamp(2.75rem,10vw,9rem), inputs py-3 for touch, MagneticButton disables pull on coarse pointer, SEND SIGNAL min-h-[48px], social links already wrap. 768px tablet: HUD frame returns (24px matte), SectionNav dots visible, SectionHUD vertical rail visible, giant section numbers show (note: tablet 04 visually overlaps EXECUTION.LAYER due to text-[10rem] vs pl-56 — pre-existing behavior, not introduced by this pass). 1440px desktop: no regressions, hero / projects / contact unchanged from pre-pass look; Playwright screenshots confirmed.
warnings: Tablet Projects / Experience giant section number (04, 05) still overlaps headline at 768px because the 10rem clamp is larger than md:pl-56. Pre-existing; not part of this task's scope, but flagged for follow-up.
SectionHUD mobile strip sits at top-10 (40px) so it lives below the HUD top-label band. Verify at very narrow (<360px) devices that DEV.OS + clock + strip do not collide.
